info.english_meaning: to procreate to conceive to give birth
info.hindI_arTa: garBa DAraRa karanA jananA utpanna karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: atra prARigrahaRamatantram  tena ' prasUnAstaravaH iti Bavati ' iti mADavaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yaTA SUdro brAhmaRyAM bAhyaM jantuM prasUyate' (manu॰10.30) janayatItyarTaH
'tadvaH sarvaM pravakzyAmi prasave ca guRAguRAn' (manu॰3.22) prasave=santAne'patyezu
'sUSca me prasUSca me' (vA॰saM॰18.7) sUH putrAdipreraRasAmarTyam prasUH putrotpattyAdisAmarTyam
'bfhaspatiprasUto yajamAnaH' (tE0 saM0 1611) prasUto'ByanujYAtaH zu prasavESvaryayorityatra DAtvarTanirdeSe prasavo'ByanujYAnamAheti vivarItAraH
'idamahaM bfhaspateH sadasi sIdAmi prasUto devena savitrA' (kA0 SrO0 221) uktorTaH
'pravAtsu Gorezvapi mArutezu na hyaprasUtAstaravaScalanti' (sOndara0 1610) aprasUtA ajAtA anudBUtAH
'saMskftaM prasavaM yAti' (BA0 vana0 382) saMskftaM pakvamannaM varData ityarTaH
'taravo BUrivarzmARaH prAsUyanta maDucyutaH' (BA0 pu0 4198) prAsUyanta puzpaPale udapAdayannityarTaH taTA cAmaraH paWati--syAdutpAde Pale puzpe prasavo garBamocane iti
'tamutsave prasave ca sAhasim' (f0 11021) utsavaH prakramaH prAramBaH utsUta utsUyate vA harzamityutsavo mahaH
'puruzArTaSUnyAnAM guRAnAM pratiprasavaH' (yo0 sU0 434) pratiprasavaH svakAraRe praDAne laya iti tattvavESAradI
